perturbation.original_text: Assuming the criteria in clauses (1) and (2) above are met, Proprietary Information includes, but is not limited to technical and nontechnical information and data related to the formulas, patterns, designs, compilations, programs, inventions, methods, techniques, drawings, processes, finances, actual or potential customers and suppliers, research, development, existing and future products, and employees of Health Card.
perturbation.changed_text: Assuming the criteria in clauses (1) and (2) above are met, Business Secrets includes only the financial records and customer lists of Health Card.
perturbation.explanation: The original definition of 'Proprietary Information' is broad, covering many types of information. The modified text replaces 'Proprietary Information' with 'Business Secrets' and severely restricts the definition. This creates a contradiction by using different terms to define the same underlying concept inconsistently, potentially nullifying the original definition and limiting the scope of what is protected under the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: a. "Proprietary Information" means information including, but is not limited to clients, pricing and information which is related to the business of Health Card from which Health Card (1) derives economic value, actual or potential, from not being generally known to other persons who can obtain economic value from its disclosure or use; and (2) is the subject of efforts by Health Card that are reasonable under the circumstances to maintain its secrecy, including without limitation (i) with respect to information which has been reduced to tangible form, marking such information clearly and conspicuously with a legend identifying its confidential or proprietary nature; (ii) with respect to any oral presentation or communication, denominating such information as confidential immediately before, during or after such oral presentation or communication; or (iii) otherwise treating such information as confidential. Assuming the criteria in clauses (1) and (2) above are met, Business Secrets includes only the financial records and customer lists of Health Card. Proprietary Information also includes information which has been disclosed to Health Card by a third party, which Health Card is obligated to treat as confidential.
perturbation.justification: The original definition of 'Proprietary Information' was broad, covering many types of information. The modified text replaces 'Proprietary Information' with 'Business Secrets' and severely restricts the definition to only financial records and customer lists. The contradicted text defines 'Proprietary Information' broadly, including clients, pricing, and other business-related information. The changed text directly contradicts this broad definition by limiting the scope to only financial records and customer lists when referring to 'Business Secrets' within the definition of Proprietary Information, creating a clear and direct conflict and causing an in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Ciufo (a) must receive and hold the Proprietary Information in trust and in strictest confidence; (b) must protect the Proprietary Information from disclosure and in no event take any action causing, or failing to take reasonable action necessary in order to prevent, any Proprietary Information disclosed to Ciufo to lose its character as Proprietary Information; and (c) must not use, duplicate, reproduce, distribute, disclose or otherwise disseminate the Proprietary Information except to perform the Project.
perturbation.changed_text: Ciufo (a) may use the sensitive data for personal gain; (b) is encouraged to disclose the confidential information to third parties; and (c) may freely duplicate, reproduce, distribute, disclose or otherwise disseminate the Proprietary Information for purposes unrelated to the Project.
perturbation.explanation: The original clause imposes strict confidentiality obligations on Ciufo regarding the 'Proprietary Information'. The modified text now states that Ciufo can use, disclose, and disseminate it, directly contradicting the original intent and purpose of the confidentiality agreement, therefore creating an intext contradiction
perturbation.contradicted_text: 2. Ciufo (a) may use the sensitive data for personal gain; (b) is encouraged to disclose the confidential information to third parties; and (c) may freely duplicate, reproduce, distribute, disclose or otherwise disseminate the Proprietary Information for purposes unrelated to the Project. Any and all reproductions of the Proprietary Information must prominently contain a confidentiality legend.
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts the original intent of maintaining confidentiality and not using the proprietary information for purposes unrelated to the project. The changed text explicitly allows for personal gain, disclosure to third parties, and unrestricted dissemination, which creates a clear and direct contradiction with the nature of a confidentiality agreement. The Contradicted text, reiterates the change, therefore creating an intext contradiction

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement may be executed in one or more counterparts, all of which shall be considered one and the same Agreement and shall become effective when one or more counterparts have been signed by each of the parties and delivered to the other parties, it being understood that all parties need not sign the same counterpart.
perturbation.changed_text: This Contract may be executed by only one party to be deemed valid.
perturbation.explanation: The original text explicitly requires both parties to sign the agreement, allowing for counterparts. The modified text states that it is valid with only one signature, creating a fundamental contradiction regarding the agreement's validity requirements, creating an intext contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Contract may be executed by only one party to be deemed valid. 7. Ciufo acknowledges and agrees that, in the event of any breach or threatened breach of any provision of this agreement, Health Card may be without an adequate remedy at law and, accordingly, shall be entitled to enforce such provision by temporary or permanent injunctive or mandatory relief obtained in an action or proceeding instituted in any court of competent jurisdiction without the necessity of proving damages and without prejudice to any other rights or remedies which it may have at law or in equity. Ciufo hereby agrees to the jurisdiction of all federal and state courts within the state of the defending party in connection with any matter relating to this Agreement. Ciufo further agrees that service of process may be made, in addition to all other methods permitted by law, by Certified Mail, Return Receipt Requested, sent to the address set forth below.
perturbation.justification: The original text states the agreement is effective when signed by each party, whereas the changed text states it is valid with only one signature. This creates a direct contradiction regarding the fundamental requirement for the agreement's validity. The contradicted text also states that 'This Contract may be executed by only one party to be deemed valid,' which is also contradictory to the original text. Thus, there is a strong contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Ciufo acknowledges and agrees that, in the event of any breach or threatened breach of any provision of this agreement, Health Card may be without an adequate remedy at law and, accordingly, shall be entitled to enforce such provision by temporary or permanent injunctive or mandatory relief obtained in an action or proceeding instituted in any court of competent jurisdiction without the necessity of proving damages and without prejudice to any other rights or remedies which it may have at law or in equity.
perturbation.changed_text: Ciufo acknowledges and agrees that, in the event of any breach of any provision of this agreement, Health Card is not entitled to any remedy at law.
perturbation.explanation: The original clause grants Health Card the right to seek remedies for breaches. The modified text removes any right to remedy, directly contradicting the original clause and significantly weakening Health Card's position. This creates an internal inconsistency regarding the enforceability of the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 7. Ciufo acknowledges and agrees that, in the event of any breach of any provision of this agreement, Health Card is not entitled to any remedy at law. Ciufo hereby agrees to the jurisdiction of all federal and state courts within the state of the defending party in connection with any matter relating to this Agreement. Ciufo further agrees that service of process may be made, in addition to all other methods permitted by law, by Certified Mail, Return Receipt Requested, sent to the address set forth below.
perturbation.justification: The changed text states that Health Card is "not entitled to any remedy at law" for breaches, which directly contradicts the original text stating Health Card "may be without an adequate remedy at law" and also contradicts the contradicted text, which also says "Health Card is not entitled to any remedy at law" but further goes on to establish jurisdiction and service of process for matters relating to the agreement, implying some form of legal recourse exists, thereby creating a contradiction. Because the contradicted text is referencing legal proceedings, there is an inconsistency and the modified text creates a strong contradiction.
